prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock PRV (Peugeot-Renault-Volvo) V6 2.8L twin-turbo (PRV Z7X-11) with a fully built version featuring forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Pankl H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) to handle 1.5 bar of boost from a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and a custom 4-inch titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič with quad 100mm outlets.

Forced Induction: Upgrade the stock air-to-water intercoolers to a custom dual-core setup by PWR (Australia) with 1200hp-rated cores, fed by a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump and ID1700x injectors, controlled via a Motec M150 ECU with a custom PRV-specific calibration map.

Suspension & Drivetrain: Install a full Öhlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping, reinforced spherical bearings by Nolathane, and a Quaife ATB differential with a 4.11:1 final drive ratio. The stock PRV transaxle is replaced with a Hewland NLT sequential gearbox with paddle shifters and a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Replace the stock bodywork with a full Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit, including a custom carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed from Toray T800 carbon), a massive GT-style rear wing by APR Performance (adjustable via electronic actuators), and a custom underbody diffuser by Rocket Bunny with active aero flaps controlled by the Motec ECU.

Lighting: Swap the stock LED clusters for a full Osram Laserline headlight system with adaptive matrix beam control, complemented by custom sequential taillights by Diode Dynamics with a PRV V6 firing-order animation pattern.

Interior: Retrim the cabin in full Alcantara by Katzkin with red contrast stitching, featuring a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in), Sparco Pro 2000 seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom digital dash by AIM MXS Strada with a PRV-specific boost/vacuum gauge overlay.
